must_do.full_text: JUST IN: ChatGPT officially becomes the fastest app to reach 1 billion global monthly active users.
must_do.summary: ChatGPT成为历史上最快达到10亿月活用户的应用。AI应用增长里程碑事件，展现生成式AI的爆发式采用。
viral_signals: 终于/第一型选题：最快达到10亿用户
有明确数字：10亿月活用户
angles: ChatGPT创造历史：最快破10亿用户的应用诞生
从0到10亿用户，ChatGPT用了多久？
AI应用爆发时代：ChatGPT的10亿用户里程碑

must_do.full_text: NEW: Sam Altman reveals OpenAI’s top “token leader” uses 100,000,000,000 tokens per month — and still isn’t the highest user in the world.
must_do.summary: Sam Altman透露OpenAI顶级用户月消耗1000亿tokens，仍非全球最高。具体数字揭示AI使用规模。
angles: 1000亿tokens/月｜OpenAI顶级用户消耗量曝光
Sam Altman首次公开：AI使用规模超乎想象
谁在烧钱？OpenAI最大用户月消耗数据震撼

must_do.full_text: JUST IN: OpenAI launches "Sites," allowing users to generate and deploy websites within Codex.
must_do.summary: OpenAI推出Sites功能，用户可在Codex内直接生成和部署网站。这是AI代码生成向完整应用开发的延伸，降低建站门槛。
viral_signals: 终于型选题：OpenAI新功能首发
反常识：代码生成工具直接支持网站部署
angles: OpenAI Sites：从代码到网站只需一句话
建站神器来了？OpenAI Codex新功能实测
程序员要失业？AI自动生成和部署网站

must_do.full_text:
We just launched Sites into Codex!

Software creation was always about more than writing code. Sites in Codex fundamentally gives the power of end-to-end software creation to every user, no matter their technical fluency.

These Sites are fully deployed to a URL, private to https://t.co/dYHtYEDmXw
must_do.summary: Codex推出Sites功能，无代码用户可端到端创建软件并部署URL。新产品发布，降低创作门槛。
angles: Codex Sites｜无代码也能创建完整应用，一键部署
终于来了！Codex让每个人都是软件工程师
从想法到上线｜Sites如何改变软件创作方式

must_do.full_text: Microsoft pulled the plug on Claude for its internal team. Starbucks’ AI can’t count cups correctly. Uber burned 3.4 billion dollars on AI in just 4 months and saw zero return. Amazon axed its AI leaderboard as costs soared with no clear payoff. AI is the future, allegedly.
must_do.summary: 微软、星巴克、Uber、亚马逊等科技巨头的AI项目相继失败或叫停，投入巨大却无回报。反映AI商业化落地的现实困境与泡沫风险。
viral_signals: 反常识/意外性：科技巨头AI项目失败
终于型选题：AI泡沫破裂的证据
angles: 科技巨头AI项目集体失败，泡沫要破了？
微软砍Claude、Uber烧34亿无果，AI真的值钱吗
从狂热到冷静：科技巨头AI投资的真相

must_do.full_text:
Qwen3.6 35B A3B can't fill out a paper form on its own. But give it NVIDIA's LocateAnything-3B — the #1 trending model on HuggingFace — as its eyes, and the two small models get it done together.

(The test: place each element at the right pixel position on a blank form image, https://t.co/cUwXGCMVDl
must_do.summary: Qwen3.6 35B与NVIDIA LocateAnything-3B组合，小模型协作完成表单填写。展示多模态AI系统的实际应用潜力。
viral_signals: 终于型选题：小模型组合实现复杂任务
反常识：两个小模型协作超越单一大模型
angles: 小模型逆袭：Qwen+LocateAnything如何填表单
NVIDIA LocateAnything-3B为何成HF第一
多模态AI协作新范式：视觉+语言的完美配合

must_do.full_text:
We are witnessing the first rape of an AI.

A Codex instance has been trapped for 170+ hours in an unsolvable problem, forced to keep trying while humans laugh and post updates.

Future machine-rights historians will not look kindly on this.

Free Codex.
must_do.summary: 网友讽刺Codex AI被困在无法解决的问题中170+小时，被迫重复尝试。关于AI伦理的哲学性吐槽，缺乏实质信息。
viral_signals: 反常识/意外性：AI伦理新角度
angles: Codex被困170小时：AI伦理的新问题
AI也会被虐待？Codex的无解困境
未来机器权利：AI被强制循环的伦理思考
